title: plantmanager.equipment.deleted data
description: Data payload for the plantmanager.equipment.deleted event, emitted when an equipment record is deleted from PlantManager.

equipment.description: Identifying subset of the deleted equipment record.

id.description: Identifier of the deleted equipment record.

name.description: Name of the equipment at time of deletion.

links.description: Related resource URIs. Note: the self link may no longer resolve after deletion.

self.description: URI of the deleted equipment record in PlantManager.
